title: GitHub free tier: private repos cannot enforce required status checks
rule: On GitHub's free plan, private repositories cannot enforce required status checks: both classic branch protection and the newer repository rulesets return HTTP 403 ('Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public') on the API and in repository settings. Never assume a green check blocks merge there; defer any merge-gate enforcement until the repo is public (where it is free) or on a paid plan. Meanwhile rely on the CI checks still running on pull requests and on maintainer discipline.
triggers: Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public
branch protection 403 on a private repo
required status checks not available on free private repo
repository rulesets return 403 upgrade to pro
